base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of unused_boss_sprite — a character (boss) from 1986 castlevania. 'Unused' label on sheet — boss-candidate sprite present in ROM data but not used in retail levels. May be prototype variant or mid-development cut. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'Unused' label on sheet — boss-candidate sprite present in ROM data but not used in retail levels. May be prototype variant or mid-development cut
